CustomField.formula: IF(ShippingCountry <> "US","NA", IF(CONTAINS("350, 351, 352, 354, 355, 356, 357, 358, 359, 360, 361, 362, 363, 364, 367, 368, 369", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "R01", IF(CONTAINS("304, 308, 309, 310, 312, 313, 314, 315, 316, 317, 318, 319,398", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "R02", IF(CONTAINS("376, 377, 378, 379, 385", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "R03", IF(CONTAINS("305, 307", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "R04", IF(CONTAINS("373, 374", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "R05", IF(CONTAINS("300, 301, 302, 303, 306, 311, 399", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "R06", IF(CONTAINS("320, 321, 322, 323, 324, 326, 327, 328, 337, 344, 346, 347", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "R07", IF(CONTAINS("329, 330, 331, 332, 333, 334, 335, 336, 338, 339, 340, 341, 342, 349", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "R08", IF(CONTAINS("370, 371, 372, 375, 380, 381, 382, 383, 384, 386, 387, 388, 389, 397", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "R09", IF(CONTAINS("325, 365, 366, 390, 391, 392, 393, 394, 395, 396", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "R10", IF(CONTAINS("270, 271, 272, 273, 274, 275, 276, 277, 278, 279, 280, 281, 282, 283, 284, 285", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "R11", IF(CONTAINS("290, 291, 292, 293, 295, 297", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "R12", IF(CONTAINS("286, 287, 288, 289", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "R13", IF(CONTAINS("294, 298, 299", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "R14", IF(CONTAINS("296", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "R15", "NA"))))))))))))))))
CustomField.label: GeoCodeRxx
